{{CargoRelic
|name=Munsell Color System
|class_id=22594
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=07-12
|source=
|description=On Jul 12, 1898 AD, the American artist Munsell established his own color description system.<br>The Munsell color system is a color description method that uses three dimensions to describe colors based on lightness, chroma, and hue. It is a color standard system formulated based on the visual perception of colors from a psychological perspective. Currently, this color standard system is widely used internationally as a method of color classification and calibration.
|fame=43
|art=30
|fth=49
|civ=39
|tech=67
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
